title: CypherX Rerank API (Contract 2.x)
description: Request/response contract for the cross-encoder reranking endpoint exposed by the RAG/SharedCore reranker. Given a query and a set of candidate documents, the reranker returns the candidates scored and ordered by relevance. Forward-compatible: every object sets additionalProperties:true and requires only validation-mandatory fields, so later phases may add optional fields (e.g. return_documents, max_chunks_per_doc) without a breaking v2. The RAG_RERANK_ENABLED flag defaults off; when off, callers never reach this endpoint and the dense pipeline behaviour is unchanged.

model.description: Reranker model identifier (e.g. `bge-reranker-base`, `cohere-rerank-3`, or the `mock` reranker used in keyless local dev).

query.description: The search query the documents are scored against.

documents.description: Candidate documents to rerank. Order is the caller's input order; results reference documents by their `index` in this array.

id.description: Optional caller-supplied identifier for the document. Echoed back in the matching result when provided.

text.description: The document text scored against the query.

top_n.description: Optional. Return only the top N results by score. When omitted, all documents are returned ranked.

results.description: Reranked candidates ordered by descending relevance score. Each entry points back at a request document by its `index`.

index.description: Zero-based position of the scored document in the request `documents` array.

id.description: The caller-supplied document id, echoed when the request document carried one.

score.description: Relevance score assigned by the reranker. Higher is more relevant; absolute range is model-specific.

model.description: The reranker model that produced these scores.

usage.description: Optional usage accounting for the rerank call (e.g. search units consumed), used for Contract 19 metering.

total_tokens.description: Total tokens processed across query + documents, when the model reports it.

search_units.description: Billable search units consumed by the rerank call, when applicable.
